title: Crunchy Kenyan Mashup Bowl
description: A delicious and nutritious bowl recipe combining the flavors of Kenya with crunchy goodness. Perfect for a post-workout snack or meal.
instructions: 2. Wash and peel the sweet potatoes, and slice them into 1-inch pieces.
3. Toss the sweet potato slices with a drizzle of oil and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
4. In a separate pan, heat some oil over medium heat.
5. Add the chickpeas and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Slice the avocado and set aside.
7. In a large bowl, combine the roasted sweet potatoes, chickpeas, avocado, and a sprinkle of crunchy oat flakes.
8. Top with a spoonful of mixed berries and a drizzle of your favorite sauce.
10. Refrigerate leftovers for up to 3 days.
11. Store the ingredients in airtight containers for up to 5 days.
